CREATE TABLE test_files (file_id INT PRIMARY KEY, file_name VARCHAR(255));
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE file_name = 'test_file_2.txt' AND file_id IN (SELECT file_id FROM test_files WHERE file_id > 1);
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE file_id IN (SELECT file_id FROM test_files WHERE file_name LIKE 'test_file_%' AND file_id <= 3);
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE file_id IN (SELECT file_id FROM (SELECT file_id FROM test_files) AS subquery);
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE file_id = (SELECT MAX(file_id) FROM test_files);
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE file_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT file_id FROM test_files WHERE file_name IS NOT NULL);
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE file_id = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_files WHERE file_name = 'test_file_3.txt');
